emptyState.title: No templates yet
emptyState.description: Create your first template to define how receipts will be printed.

blocksPanel.title: Blocks
blocksPanel.description: Drag a block by its grip or use the arrow buttons to reorder. Up to 50 blocks per layout.
blocksPanel.empty: Add a block to get started.

dragAndDrop.screenReaderInstructions: To pick up a block, press space or enter. While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the block. Press space or enter again to drop, or escape to cancel.

previewPanel.title: Live preview
previewPanel.templateIssues: Fix the highlighted template expressions before the preview can render.

blockFields.columnsHelp: Pick the columns to print, in order.
blockFields.itemsTableCaption: Rows are bound to the items in the current sale. Use the columns below to pick which ones get printed.
blockFields.totalsBlockCaption: Where do these values come from?

totalsBlockBindings.subtotal: Subtotal — sum of item totals before taxes.
totalsBlockBindings.discount: Discount — total discounts applied to items.
totalsBlockBindings.taxTotal: Tax — sum of tax amounts across all items.
totalsBlockBindings.tip: Tip — optional gratuity field on the sale.
totalsBlockBindings.grandTotal: Total — subtotal minus discounts plus taxes and tip.

blockFields.appFooterHelp: Adds three lines at the bottom of the receipt with the Puntovivo product name, URL, and support contact. Keep it enabled to credit the software, or toggle it off for a branding-free receipt.

codeEditor.placeholder: Use double curly braces to open the picker for variables and functions.

linter.unparseable: This expression cannot be parsed. Use a namespace.field path or a functionName(...) call.

codeEditor.unavailableVariable: {{path}} is not configured for this business. The receipt will print this value as empty until the corresponding setting is populated.

functionsHelp.title: Available functions
functionsHelp.intro: Wrap any value in double curly braces to interpolate it. You can also call the functions below — combine them with paths like sale.grandTotal or with numbers and quoted strings.

entries.currency: Format a number with the business currency settings. Optional second argument overrides decimals.
entries.date: Format a date or ISO string. Pattern tokens: yyyy MM dd HH mm ss. Defaults to the business short date format.
entries.round: Round a number to N decimals (default 0).
entries.limit: Truncate text to N characters and append an ellipsis when shortened.
entries.concat: Join multiple values into a single string.
entries.default: Return the fallback when the first argument is empty (null, undefined, or whitespace only).

delete.title: Delete template
delete.confirmMessage: This template will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

errors.atLeastOneBlock: Add at least one block to the layout.
